payload.topic: Technical Health Ongoing Processes and Site Audits
payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE Technical Health Operations Playbook. Include: 1) WEEKLY checks: uptime monitoring, 404 crawl errors, robots.txt verification, sitemap freshness, SSL certificate expiry, 2) MONTHLY Screaming Frog/Sitebulb audit: page-level issues (duplicates, thin content, missing alt text), site architecture issues (redirect chains, orphan pages, deep pages), 3) QUARTERLY deep audit: log file analysis, CWV regression testing, structured data audit, link velocity analysis, competitor gap refresh, CrUX field data review, 4) Specific tools and how to use them: Screaming Frog, Sitebulb, PageSpeed Insights API, 5) Emergency response procedures for critical issues. Context: Site is built on Next.js hosted on Vercel.
